ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., shirts, music) */,
  "product_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the product for search optimization */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the product price */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor providing the product */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the product is available */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* File path for the product image */,
  "url_item" TEXT /* URL of the product page */,
  "url_shop" TEXT /* URL of the shop page */,
  "product_sku" TEXT /* Unique Stock-Keeping Unit (SKU) for each product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the vendor operates */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "vendor_fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the vendor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the order */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the shipping method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available for sale */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level for reordering the product */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock, backordered) */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for sending low stock alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the currency rate record */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for which the rate applies */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate relative to USD */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate was recorded */,
  "rate_source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shipping method */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount on the product */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date for the discount */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date for the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code for the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., size, color) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., small, red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order at the time of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, inventory manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
